rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields a better PR because its single grounded finding (antipode_convMul_id at diff:64 lives in TauCeti.HopfAlgebra ns inside FunctorOfPoints.lean but is internal-only) is correct per the shown code, matches the 'placement' rubric, and fixing it (make private) is a material improvement a maintainer would want; Review 2's file-split demand and PR-desc mismatch are either ungrounded (docstring+roadmap justify AlgebraicGroup/ location) or outside the rubric.
